settings.subheading: Colorful, sun-safe, ready for everything summer throws at them. Kid's Haven is a beach club for the small ones — playful, premium, built to last.

settings.heading: The pieces parents keep re-buying.
settings.description: Quick-dry, sun-safe, ready for the splash. These are the ones that go everywhere with us.

settings.heading: A beach club for the small ones.
settings.body:
Kid's Haven started in a tiny coastal studio with a simple belief: kids deserve beach clothes that feel as good as they look. We design every piece in-house, source sun-safe and OEKO-TEX certified fabrics, and partner with fair-wage workshops who treat every stitch like it matters — because to a kid, it kind of does.

The result? Colorful, premium, ready-for-anything pieces built to last more than one summer. Designed by parents, for parents who refuse to compromise on quality (or fun).

settings.title: Real kids, real summer.
settings.subtitle: Snapshots from the families already living in Kid's Haven this season.

settings.quote: We bought one swimsuit to test. We now own four. The UPF is real and the patterns are chef's kiss.
settings.author: Maya R.

settings.quote: My daughter wore her cover-up straight from the beach to dinner. Got three compliments before dessert.
settings.author: Daniel K.

settings.quote: Finally — kids' beach clothes that don't look like a cartoon. Premium feel, fun colors, perfect fit.
settings.author: Aisha B.

settings.title: Get the new drops first.
settings.text: One letter a month, no spam — early access to new collections, beach inspiration, and the occasional free shipping code.
